channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Israel, Hezbollah Have Agreed To Ceasefire: Report

media:content.media:description: US, Israel have agreed to start a ceasefire after Israeli strikes killed 21.

item.description: Israel and Hezbollah have agreed to a ceasefire set to begin at 4 pm local time on Friday, a senior US official told Reuters.
item.content:encoded: Israel and Hezbollah have agreed to a ceasefire set to begin at 4 pm local time on Friday, a senior US official told Reuters.

item.title: Trump Asked Which World Leader He Admires Most, He Picks PM Modi, Xi Jinping

media:content.media:description: In the Axios interview, Trump repeatedly assessed power in terms of submission.

item.description: Donald Trump made the remarks on "The Axios Show" on Thursday, shortly after returning from a G7 summit in France that he described as "very dominant".
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump made the remarks on "The Axios Show" on Thursday, shortly after returning from a G7 summit in France that he described as "very dominant".

item.title: Meet 'The Gentlemen': The Ransomware Gang Offering Hackers A 90% Cut

media:content.media:description: The Gentlemen's rise says a lot about the evolution of cybercrime.

item.description: Modern ransomware groups operate more like multinational businesses. They recruit talent, offer incentives, provide customer support to affiliates and compete aggressively for market share.
item.content:encoded: Modern ransomware groups operate more like multinational businesses. They recruit talent, offer incentives, provide customer support to affiliates and compete aggressively for market share.

item.title: "Dagnabbit, We Got Hormuzled": Jimmy Kimmel Prods Trump On Iran Deal
item.description: Donald Trump's behavior at the G7 Summit drew criticism and ridicule from late-night hosts and politicians alike.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's behavior at the G7 Summit drew criticism and ridicule from late-night hosts and politicians alike.

item.title: 194-Year-Old Tortoise Becomes World's Oldest Known Land Animal

media:content.media:description: Jonathan is also known for celebrating his birthday with a vegan cake.

item.description: Experts are also studying Jonathan's DNA because his cells do not appear to mutate in the same way as human cells.
item.content:encoded: Experts are also studying Jonathan's DNA because his cells do not appear to mutate in the same way as human cells.

item.title: Ratings Pressure, Israel Rift: Why Trump Signed 'Unequal' Iran Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: The deal provides Iran with economic breathing space and could reduce US' leverage in future

item.description: As sanctions begin to ease and economic pressure on Iran diminishes, the next phase of negotiations will determine whether Washington can secure meaningful and lasting nuclear restrictions or whether Tehran emerges with even greater bargaining power.
item.content:encoded: As sanctions begin to ease and economic pressure on Iran diminishes, the next phase of negotiations will determine whether Washington can secure meaningful and lasting nuclear restrictions or whether Tehran emerges with even greater bargaining power.

item.title: 18 Dead In Israeli Strikes On Lebanon As US-Iran Talks Pushed Back

media:content.media:description: Benjamin Netanyahu has refused to withdraw, saying Israeli forces will remain in Lebanon

item.description: Lebanon's state-run National News Agency reported at least 16 people were killed in Israeli airstrikes, which the Israeli military said were ongoing.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1115293/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Lebanon's state-run National News Agency reported at least 16 people were killed in Israeli airstrikes, which the Israeli military said were ongoing.

item.title: "It Could Change In A Week": Expert Explains Why US-Iran Deal Is Tricky

media:content.media:description: Bremmer argued that the US is now likely to portray Iran as more pragmatic.

item.description: For Trump, the details of the peace agreement are politically embarrassing because they suggest a softer approach toward Iran than the administration previously promoted.
item.content:encoded: For Trump, the details of the peace agreement are politically embarrassing because they suggest a softer approach toward Iran than the administration previously promoted.

item.title: Ukraine's New Drone Strategy Is Putting Russian Supply Lines Under Pressure

media:content.media:description: Military analysts say the campaign is creating fuel shortages, and slowing Russian operations.

item.description: Ukraine's latest drone campaign is focused on disrupting the flow of fuel, equipment and personnel behind Russian lines.
item.content:encoded: Ukraine's latest drone campaign is focused on disrupting the flow of fuel, equipment and personnel behind Russian lines.

item.title: Why Trump Thinks He's 'Most Powerful Person To Walk This Planet'
item.description: The post, written by a ‘Dave King’, compared Trump’s influence with some of history’s most well-known rulers and military leaders, including William the Conqueror, Genghis Khan, Napoleon and Alexander the Great.
item.content:encoded: The post, written by a ‘Dave King’, compared Trump’s influence with some of history’s most well-known rulers and military leaders, including William the Conqueror, Genghis Khan, Napoleon and Alexander the Great.

item.title: Top US Scientist Funded Wuhan Lab That Sparked Covid? A Big 'Expose'

media:content.media:description: Tulsi Gabbard said these were "never-before-seen" documents

item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, who last month quit as Trump's intelligence chief, said Anthony Fauci funded "dangerous gain-of-function research on bat coronaviruses" at the Wuhan Institute of Virology.
item.content:encoded: Tulsi Gabbard, who last month quit as Trump's intelligence chief, said Anthony Fauci funded "dangerous gain-of-function research on bat coronaviruses" at the Wuhan Institute of Virology.

item.title: US-Iran LIVE Updates: JD Vance Cancels Switzerland Visit, Muted Activity In Hormuz

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US and Iran signed the deal digitally.

item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

item.title: Afghanistan Carries Out Airstrikes In Pakistan Amid Rising Tensions

media:content.media:description: Taliban warned it would not tolerate any threat to its territorial security.

item.description: It further claimed that all pre-identified targets were successfully struck and described the operation as a "precise response" to ongoing threats originating beyond its borders.
item.content:encoded: It further claimed that all pre-identified targets were successfully struck and described the operation as a "precise response" to ongoing threats originating beyond its borders.

item.title: Fire Breaks Out At Tokyo Elementary School, 300 Students And Staff Evacuated

media:content.media:description: The cause of the fire is still under investigation.

item.description: Firefighters rescued one teacher and several schoolchildren out of the building, with non-life-threatening injuries, the department said.
item.content:encoded: Firefighters rescued one teacher and several schoolchildren out of the building, with non-life-threatening injuries, the department said.

item.title: "Would Make Patients Lighter": Japan Ex-Doctor Backs Amputations To Ease Care

media:content.media:description: The government estimates a shortfall of about 570,000 carers by 2040

item.description: Kusakabe, a former geriatric specialist from Osaka, said removing paralysed limbs would make patients lighter and "reduce the burden on caregivers" in case the care industry reaches crisis point.
item.content:encoded: Kusakabe, a former geriatric specialist from Osaka, said removing paralysed limbs would make patients lighter and "reduce the burden on caregivers" in case the care industry reaches crisis point.

item.title: Explained: How Andy Burnham Could Attempt To Replace Keir Starmer As UK PM

media:content.media:description: Burnham will be sworn into parliament next week, giving him a chance to challenge Starmer

item.description: Burnham has said he would run in any leadership race, and is the frontrunner to replace Starmer. But some of his supporters are divided over how, and when, to challenge the prime minister.
item.content:encoded: Burnham has said he would run in any leadership race, and is the frontrunner to replace Starmer. But some of his supporters are divided over how, and when, to challenge the prime minister.

item.title: Andy Burnham's 'King Of North' Politics Will Be Tested If He Becomes UK PM

media:content.media:description: Burnham performed a delicate balancing act as he campaigned for the parliamentary seat of Makerfield

item.description: After winning a seat in parliament for his local area of Makerfield, Burnham, 56, hopes to ride a level of popularity rarely enjoyed by politicians to become Britain's seventh prime minister in a decade.
item.content:encoded: After winning a seat in parliament for his local area of Makerfield, Burnham, 56, hopes to ride a level of popularity rarely enjoyed by politicians to become Britain's seventh prime minister in a decade.

item.title: Sweden PM Ulf Kristersson Faces Fresh Corruption Allegations Ahead Of Polls

media:content.media:description: Kristersson also faced accusations of conflict of interest in his sister-in-law's business affairs

item.description: Headlines across Sweden in recent days have focused on questionable ethics from Kristersson and his wife, ordained Lutheran priest Birgitta Ed.
item.content:encoded: Headlines across Sweden in recent days have focused on questionable ethics from Kristersson and his wife, ordained Lutheran priest Birgitta Ed.

item.title: Palestine Urges India, World To Act As Gaza Health System Nears Collapse

media:content.media:description: Children have been among the worst affected

item.description: According to the embassy, more than 12,000 bodies remain trapped beneath rubble across Gaza, while damage to cemeteries has left human remains exposed in several areas.
item.content:encoded: According to the embassy, more than 12,000 bodies remain trapped beneath rubble across Gaza, while damage to cemeteries has left human remains exposed in several areas.

item.title: Exclusive | "He Blinked": Ex-Trump Ally John Bolton Calls Iran Deal A "Political Disaster"

media:content.media:description: Bolton said Trump was caught off guard by the economic consequences of the crisis

item.description: John Bolton, who served as Donald Trump's national security advisor during his first term, called the US-Iran peace Memorandum of Understanding a "very bad deal".
item.content:encoded: John Bolton, who served as Donald Trump's national security advisor during his first term, called the US-Iran peace Memorandum of Understanding a "very bad deal".
